bridge-type.label: Growatt account bridge
bridge-type.description: The account used to act as a bridge towards the Growatt API

channel.label: Current power sum
channel.description: The sum of the current power of all plants associated with this account

channel.label: Today energy sum
channel.description: The total sum of energy produced by all plants today

channel.label: Total energy sum
channel.description: The total sum of energy produced by all plants

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Growatt username
parameter.description: The username used to login to the Growatt server

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Growatt password
parameter.description: The password of the Growatt user to connect to the Growatt server

parameter.name: server
parameter.description: The network address of the server hosting the Growatt API
parameter.label: Server name

thing-type.label: Plant
thing-type.description: Represents a plant, i.e. a location where power is created and/or stored.

channel.label: Current Power (kW)
channel.description: Provides the current power in kilowatts of the plant

channel.label: Cumlative power generation (kWh)
channel.description: The cumulative power generation in kilo watt hours of the plant
